kpis.name: initial_code_generation_speed
kpis.definition: Time from task ready to first useful implementation artifact.
kpis.instrumentation: task.ready and artifact.created events with duration percentiles
kpis.caveats: Depends on task complexity mix and human idle time.

kpis.name: bug_reduction
kpis.definition: Change in defect introduction or escape rate versus baseline.
kpis.instrumentation: issue.created with severity and discovery_phase tags
kpis.caveats: Reporting quality and triage latency affect counts.

kpis.name: architecture_quality
kpis.definition: Share of changes that pass architecture and contract gates without waiver.
kpis.caveats: Gate strictness changes invalidate naive trend comparison.

kpis.name: rework_reduction
kpis.definition: Reduction in repeat work on the same acceptance criteria or failed checks.
kpis.caveats: Product requirement churn can look like rework.

kpis.name: token_consumption
kpis.definition: Tokens and useful-context ratio for model-assisted workflows.
kpis.instrumentation: llm.usage with cache_hit and context_pack_size fields
kpis.caveats: Must pair with quality and correction metrics.
